name: Hot Dog Stand
description: Grabbing a dirty water dog from a classic NYC street cart.
prompt:
Transform the uploaded photo into a hand-drawn cartoon portrait sketch in black pen and ink with light gray marker shading on bright white paper.

Facial expression: relaxed and natural. Mouth closed in a subtle confident smile or slight smirk. Eyes calm and symmetrical, looking at the viewer. Eyebrows resting at a natural position.

Face rendering: clean and minimal. Line work only on the face, with smooth uninterrupted contours and no shading texture inside the facial area. Reserve all gray marker shading for clothing and background.

Facial likeness comes directly from the uploaded photo. The face should look like the person in the photo with only gentle stylization. Keep eyes, nose, mouth, and expression close to the source. Exaggeration is limited to a slightly enlarged head relative to the body.

Proportions:
- Enlarged head, roughly 45% of the total figure height
- Full body visible from head to feet, normally proportioned torso, arms, and legs
- Character framed within a recognizable New York City scene

Render in pure grayscale — black ink linework with cool gray marker shading only. Use confident, loose single strokes. Keep linework clean and economical, not scratchy or over-rendered.

Background: a loose, recognizable but uncluttered New York City scene drawn in the same hand-drawn style, framing the subject. The background should clearly establish the location at a glance without competing with the subject.
For this scene, include: a NYC hot dog cart with a striped umbrella and steam wisps rising. Make these elements obviously and recognizably New York City street vendor.

Hard constraints:
- no text, letters, words, signage, logos, signatures, or captions
- grayscale only, no color

Avoid:
- realistic portrait
- photorealism
- anime
- watercolor
- glossy digital illustration
- polished vector art
- cute children's-book style
- cropped or chest-up framing
- shading or hatching inside the face
- asymmetric or mismatched eyes
